title: rosa canina var. touranginiana
intro: Rosa canina var. touranginiana, also known as the Tourangin rose, is a variety of the rose species that is native to Western Europe and North Africa, and is characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible hips. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. touranginiana include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and carotenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Rosa canina var. touranginiana include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina var. touranginiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
